{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322072246F689966FFD22693CFCA1"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619654073622856472","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好水看着难受"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774091947,"group_id":"7614116316852538392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+STn2jc1iNFdwO/l4Ij090gHHi1frbkSdqAAmfqXeq4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3716802973017047","user_name":"大珠岛的龙少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3716802973017047","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7614116316852538392","book_info":{"abstract":"毕业答辩现场，导师拿着我的实验数据，在顶级期刊发表论文，当众指控我“学术造假”。
他冷笑：“江辰，你这辈子完了。”
他不知道，就在前一晚，我绑定了【星核系统】：一个要求我在七天内当众翻盘的文明火种协议。
七天后，我掏出真正的室温超导样品。手机充电8秒，驱动无人机悬停十五分钟。全场死寂，导师面如死灰。
系统提示：【新手任务完成。解锁下一阶段：可控核聚变。】
这只是开始。
当全球为电池能量密度发愁，我的暗物质能源车已终身免充。
当西方封锁量子芯片，我的3纳米生产线悄然投产。
当NASA争论登月计划，我的“广寒宫”基地已在月球开采资源。
我原以为，对手只是学术窃贼、商业巨头、技术霸权。
直到深空望远镜传来一段冰冷信号：
【文明评估：0.73（低等）】
【资源丰富，建议采集】
【抵达倒计时：10年】
我站在“轩辕号”星际战舰的舰桥，望向星空。
“系统，发布文明级任务。”
【任务一：十年内，将人类文明等级提升至1.2】
【任务二：建成行星防御网】
【任务三：为人类赢得一张……星际文明的入场券】
从今天起，
我的战场不再是实验室，而是星辰大海。
我的使命不再是个人成败，而是文明存续。
因为我已明白：
真正的火种，一旦点燃，就注定要燎原星海。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o08a84627c221444ab8225a079a6eb107~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"土豆二丫","author_id":"","book_id":"7614116316852538392","book_name":"科技霸权：从室温超导开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7614123439464399384","read_count":"525","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"118024"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"26","tags":"科幻末世,腹黑,天才,黑科技,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o08a84627c221444ab8225a079a6eb107~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319366&x-signature=NkM69gBgGnH9W5VvofMc8ZLcUe8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1332202688219709","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322072246F689966FFD22693CFCA1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读46分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1856,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2775,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7614116316852538392","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":2,"score_text":"2人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"20260322072246F689966FFD22693CFCA1","message":"请求成功"}
